results.rendered_html:
ā-√yā P. -yāti, to come near or towards;
to arrive, approach,  RV. ;  AV. ;  ŚBr. ;  MBh. ;  Kathās.  &c.;
to reach, attain, enter,  BhP.  &c.;
to get or fall into any state or condition;
to be reduced to, become anything (with the acc. of an abstr. noun),  Hariv. ;  MBh. ;  R. ;  BhP. ;  Ragh.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
āyā 2 P.
1 To come, arrive, approach.
2 To reach, attain, go to (any particular state); kṣayaṃ, vaśaṃ, badhaṃna, tulāṃ &c.
3 To follow, result.
4 To be possible or practicable (with inf.).
